title: Thillana Thillana Song Lyrics Muthu
stanzas: <div>Thillana Thillana Song Lyrics Muthu

Thillana thillana
nee thiththikindra thaena
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

oh manja kaattu mayna
enna konji konji ponaa
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

kannu vachchathum neethaana
adi kanni vachathum neethaana
kattil pottu naan kappam katta
kaaman sonnaanaa

Thillana thillana
nee thiththikindra thaena
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

manja kaattu mayna
unna konji konji ponaa
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

Patti kaattu muthu
neeyum padikkaatha medhai
thottu thottu pesathaane
thudithaale raadhai

kallakabadam illai
naano aeriyaatha thaerai
makkal manamthaane
endrum valukkaatha paarai

hey thoduthaala naan vandhen
eduthaala vendaamaa
aduthaalu paaraamal
thaduthaala vendaama

mudi konda un maarbil
mugam saaika vendaamaa
mudi poatu nam sondham
mudivaaga vendaamaa
thadai yedhum illaamal
thanithaala vendaamaa

Thillana thillana
nee thiththikindra thaena
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

manja kaattu mayna
unna konji konji ponaa
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

kannu vachchathum neethaana
adi kanni vachathum neethaana
kattil ponaa kappam katta
kaaman sonnaanaa

dhikku dhikku nenjil
dhikku dhikku nenjil

Sivappaana aangal ingae
sila kodi undu
karuppaana ennai kandu
kan vaithathenna

kadal vannam vaanin vannam
karu vannam thaane
kadal vaanam kaanum podhum
unai kanden naane.

mannodu seraamal
nadankindren unnaale
marudhaani podaamal
sivakindren unnaale

suttu vizhi kandaale
sokkuthadi thannaale
sikku patta el pole
ukku patten unnaale

kattuthari kaalai naanum
kattupatten unnaale.

Thillana thillana
nee thiththikindra thaena
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

oh manja kaattu mayna
enna konji konji ponaa
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

kannu vachchathum neethaana
adi kanni vachathum neethaana
kattil pottu naan kappam katta
kaaman sonnaanaa

Thillana thillana
nee thiththikindra thaena
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

manja kaattu mayna
unna konji konji ponaa
dhikku dhikku nenjil thillana

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thillana Thillana'?

The song 'Thillana Thillana' celebrates love and the joy of togetherness, filled with vibrant energy and rhythm.

In which movie does 'Thillana Thillana' appear?

'Thillana Thillana' is featured in the movie Muthu, which is known for its colorful dance sequences.

Who are the singers of 'Thillana Thillana'?

The song is sung by Mano and Sujatha Mohan, whose voices blend beautifully to create an energetic vibe.

Who composed the music for 'Thillana Thillana'?

The music for 'Thillana Thillana' was composed by the renowned A.R. Rahman, known for his innovative sound.

When was 'Thillana Thillana' released?

'Thillana Thillana' was released on October 23, 1995, and has since become a classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Muthu, the song Thillana Thillana serves as a vibrant expression of love and celebration. It captures the joyous moments of life, inviting listeners to dance and revel in happiness. The energetic beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of excitement and festivity, making it a perfect choice for celebrations and parties. Overall, the song conveys a message of joy, togetherness, and the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thillana Thillana from the movie Muthu is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, showcasing the unique collaboration of Mano and Sujatha Mohan's enchanting vocals. With A.R. Rahman's infectious beats, this song captures the essence of festive spirit and dance. Dive into the rhythmic world of Thillana Thillana and let the music take you on a joyous journey!
stanzaMeanings: You are the honey that makes my heart dance, dance in joy.
Oh, little bird, if you fly away, my heart dances in joy.
You are the one who has my eyes, and you are the one who has my heart. I have made a promise to keep my love safe.
You are the honey that makes my heart dance, dance in joy.
Little bird, if you fly away, my heart dances in joy.
You are the one who has my eyes, and you are the one who has my heart. I have made a promise to keep my love safe.
You are a pearl, but you don't speak; you just keep quiet and listen.
There is no burden on me; I am not a burden to anyone. People live without any worries.
Hey, I came here without any reason; I can leave without any reason too.
Will your face be visible when I cover my head? Will our bond end if I cover it? There will be no obstacles if we stay together.
You are the honey that makes my heart dance, dance in joy.
Little bird, if you fly away, my heart dances in joy.
You are the one who has my eyes, and you are the one who has my heart. I have made a promise to keep my love safe.
Dance in joy, dance in joy.
There are some black threads here; what will happen if they see me?
The sea color, the sky color, the compassion of the sea; I see you when I look at the sea.
I walk without merging with the earth, I am a wanderer because of you.
When I see your eyes, I feel like I am in a trance; I feel like I am caught in a net because of you.
I will also tie the knot, because of you.
You are the honey that makes my heart dance, dance in joy.
Oh, little bird, if you fly away, my heart dances in joy.
You are the one who has my eyes, and you are the one who has my heart. I have made a promise to keep my love safe.
You are the honey that makes my heart dance, dance in joy.
Little bird, if you fly away, my heart dances in joy.
